name: Sathavahana Ispat Limited
summary: Sathavahana Ispat Limited manufactures and sells pig iron, ductile iron pipes, and metallurgical coke primarily in India. The company operates through Ferrous Products and Metallurgical Coke with Co-generation Power segments. It also engages in the co-generation of power with an installed capacity of 50 megawatts. The company was incorporated in 1989 and is headquartered in Hyderabad, India.
